title: Motor Vehicles Registration and Gasoline Consumption, Iran 1962-1972
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank); underlying data from Statistical Centre of Iran, Plan Organization, Statistical Year Book 1971 (Translated), Tehran 1972
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION. Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1974_economic_development_vol4_statistical_appendix.pdf, Table 14.7, page 132 (PDF page 140). Rendered to PNG via pdftoppm -r 200 and visually read. No value interpolated, estimated, or fabricated.
notes: Fills a genuine gap: extends the existing two-point comparison in data/raw/pahlavi-era-primary-extraction/wb1962-road-vehicle-registration-1955-1961/ (1955/56 vs 1960/61 only) into a continuous annual 1962-1972 series, and updates data/raw/pahlavi-era-primary-extraction/wb1962-gasoline-consumption-1955-1962/ (which ran 1955/56-1961/62 in million liters) with a continuation in million barrels 1962-1972. Directly answers the project's 'car ownership per capita/per household' target -- this is the household/consumer-durable-goods dataset previously missing from data/raw/iran-car-ownership/ (which had only post-2000 CEIC notes, no Pahlavi-era time series). Private/government split given for cars and buses; trucks total only (no split published in source).
retrieved_by: claude (manual transcription with visual verification, pdftoppm -r 200 render + Read tool)
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
